title: tectaria aurita
intro: Tectaria aurita, also known as the auriculated shield fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat conditions such as fever, wounds, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Tectaria aurita include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying the leaves and roots, and then infusing them in hot water or using them in teas, tinctures, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
